prompt: Create a highly detailed dark fantasy anime-style portrait of a mysterious young witch in an ornate celestial gothic setting. The subject is a beautiful female sorceress with long flowing black hair, seated or posed close to the viewer in three-quarter view, her face deliberately covered by a centered rectangular censor block in a warm brown skin-tone gradient. She wears an enormous black pointed witch hat with a very wide brim and a tall twisted cone, covered in elaborate antique-gold filigree, thornlike metal vines, tiny stars, crescent moons, dangling chains, and gem-like ornaments. Her outfit is a black lace off-shoulder gothic dress with translucent sheer sleeves, floral lace trim, beadwork, and sparkling gold accents; one bare shoulder and delicate hand near her lips are visible. Include exactly 6 prominent dangling celestial ornaments from the hat brim: 3 stars, 1 crescent moon, and 2 small chain charms. The background is an opulent impossible white palace-city of towers, spires, arches, and cathedral architecture under a dim starry sky, with a large ornate golden circular mirror or halo behind the hat and a floating spiral staircase of dark wooden books on the right. Use black, antique gold, ivory white, smoky gray, and soft skin tones. The lighting should be cinematic, moody, and magical, with shimmering highlights on metal filigree, drifting sparkles, and a luxurious high-detail digital painting finish. Composition: vertical portrait, close crop, the hat dominating the top half, face block centered, palace depth behind, ultra-intricate textures, elegant occult atmosphere. Avoid modern objects, text, logos, watermarks, extra characters, or visible facial features beneath the censor block.
